steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $8$.
$$x=9$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Substituting $72$ for $f\left(x\right)$ in the given function yields $72=8x$. Dividing each side of this equation by $8$ yields $9=x$. Therefore, $f\left(x\right)=72$ when the value of $x$ is $9$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $x$ for which $f\left(x\right)=64$, not $f\left(x\right)=72$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $x$ for which $f\left(x\right)=512$, not $f\left(x\right)=72$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $x$ for which $f\left(x\right)=640$, not $f\left(x\right)=72$.
